articles.title: In Kerala HC, NMC reiterates MBBS fees can be charged only for 4.5-year academic duration
articles.summary: The National Medical Commission (NMC) has told the Kerala High Court that MBBS fees can be charged only for the prescribed four-and-a-half years of academic study, arguing that colleges cannot levy tuition beyond the notified course duration. The submission came in response to a petition by the Kerala Private Medical College Management Association.

articles.title: Indian Navy Agniveer Apprentice recruitment 2026 application closes today for 01/2027 and 02/2027 batches; apply here
articles.summary: The online application process for Indian Navy Agniveer (Apprentice) Recruitment 2026 closes today, July 5, 2026, for the 01/2027 and 02/2027 batches. Eligible unmarried Indian male candidates with the required Class 10 qualification and AICTE-recognised engineering diploma can apply online.

articles.title: RRB CEN 08/2025 exam city slip released for 311 Ministerial and Isolated Category posts; download here
articles.summary: RRB CEN 08/2025 exam city slip: The Railway Recruitment Board has released the exam city intimation slip for the Ministerial and Isolated Category recruitment under CEN 08/2025 for 311 vacancies. Registered candidates can check their allotted examination city through the official portal ahead of the written examination scheduled for July 14 and 15, 2026.

articles.title: NIELIT O Level July 2026 admit card out at student.nielit.gov.in; candidates can download theory and practical hall tickets here
articles.summary: The NIELIT O Level admit card for the July 2026 examination cycle has been released on the official student portal. Candidates can download their theory and practical hall tickets using their application or registration details and date of birth.
